title: Headroom: The Netflix Tool That Makes AI Agents 10x Cheaper
summary: Headroom is an open-source tool built by a Netflix engineer that compresses inputs to LLMs such as tool outputs, code files, and RAG results before they reach the model, reducing token usage by 60-95%. It uses content-type-aware compressors and locally trained Kompress-based models to achieve compression at zero token cost, with a breadcrumb hash mechanism for retrieving full originals on demand.
